nodes.name: iiab
nodes.en: The iiab content stack: user-facing knowledge and file services served behind the tenant domain — the part of the estate a person actually browses.

nodes.name: nextcloud
nodes.en: Nextcloud, the tenant file cloud: WebDAV storage plus OCS sharing APIs. The canonical place for user documents on the estate.

nodes.name: nextcloud-credential
nodes.en: The Nextcloud app password issued to agents. Grants WebDAV and OCS access as the bot user; skills that touch tenant files require it.
